# TimeFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable TimeFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/timefyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://timefyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.timefyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/timefyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/timefyi-embed
- API: https://timefyi.com/developers/

## Utility FYI Widget Family

- [UnitFYI Widget](https://widget.unitfyi.com)
- [HolidayFYI Widget](https://widget.holidayfyi.com)
- [NameFYI Widget](https://widget.namefyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
